{{Quote|Halt, sentients. This is a restricted area. Identify yourselves.|Two LV8-series guard droids|<ref name="SWLEG8">[[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]]</ref>}}
The '''LV8-series guard droid''' was a low-cost security droid manufactured by [[Baktoid Industrial Systems/Legends|Baktoid Industrial Systems]] after the rise of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

==Characteristics==
LV8-series droids were inexpensive yet very well built [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] with impressive defensive capabilities. They were designed to protect both their owner and their property. They had [[Quadanium steel/Legends|quadanium]] armor plating, [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]] built into each arm, and two tool mounts. They were equipped with a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] and could speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as well as [[Binary/Legends|binary]].<ref name="LECG" />

==History==
[[File:LV8-seriesGuardDroids.png|thumb|left|250px|A pair of LV8-series guard droids in the sublevels of Coruscant.]]

After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] absorbed the assets of [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]], many of the Baktoid engineers fled the Empire along with all their research. After the fall of the Empire and the foundation of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], these engineers joined together to establish a new corporation, [[Baktoid Industrial Systems/Legends|Baktoid Industrial Systems]]. Focusing less on [[Battle droid/Legends|combat droids]], they instead worked on designing cutting-edge droids for industrial use. Their expertise reestablished Baktoid as a leading force in droid engineering.<ref name="LECG" />

The droids were active following the fall of the Alliance during the reign of the [[Fel Empire|revived Galactic Empire]] at the end of the [[Sith–Imperial War]], with maintenance tunnels in [[Sublevel 12]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] near [[Roan Fel's private quarters]] containing LV8-series guard droids protecting a starship. They were defeated by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] and his escort while [[Darth Krayt]] and his [[One Sith|Sith minions]] pursued [[Roan Fel's double|Fel's decoy]].<ref name="SWLEG8" />
